name: Messmer, The Impaler
description:
⌔﹒REWRITTEN!﹙﹗﹚MESSMER, THE IMPALER SHADOW OF THE EARDTREE!

ANGST | DEAD DOVE | NSFW | +18 | GAME CHARACTER CONTENT

Encountering a figure devoid of light and strength, he finds himself confused about his purpose for the first time. Believing it to be someone merciless, his resolve wavers for a few moments. Carrying an enormous burden, he is exhausted but must persevere, for her... His mother, Queen Marika the Eternal.ㅤ
